source_pr.title: util/codec, types: add new method to get comparable hash key from MyDecimal
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? HashLeftJoin executor can't join two decimals with different fraction rightly; (#8697) ### What is changed and how it works? Add a new method MyDecimal.ToHashKey(); Using this method, keys generated by decimals with different fraction can be compared with memcmp directly; ### Check List Tests - Unit test Code changes - Has exported function/method change Side effects Related changes --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8930)

symptoms: rst := tk.MustQuery("Select * from t1, t2 where t1.v = t2.v order by t1.v") (executor/join_test.go)
failure_signature: rst := tk.MustQuery("Select * from t1, t2 where t1.v = t2.v order by t1.v") (executor/join_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: rst := tk.MustQuery("Select * from t1, t2 where t1.v = t2.v order by t1.v") (executor/join_test.go)
